site.title: Miriam González
site.subtitle: Searching for a Precision Oncology with AI

hero.tagline: One patient. A unique tumor. A real chance.
hero.title: Miriam has metastatic breast cancer and standard medicine has no answers for her case.
hero.subtitle: Her tumor has such unusual molecular features that standard protocols don't apply. An international team of oncologists is searching for the right treatment — but there are tests and resources that public healthcare doesn't cover. Your support can make the difference.

gofundme.title: Why do we need your help?
gofundme.subtitle: Every contribution brings Miriam closer to a molecular biopsy that could change her treatment and set a precedent for other patients.
what_items: Bone re-biopsy with advanced molecular profiling
Extended and functional immunohistochemistry (p-AKT, p-ERK, SSTR2)
gofundme.why_title: Why isn't this covered by public healthcare?
gofundme.why_text: Current clinical guidelines classify this tumor as "standard HR+", but its real biology — with 80% neuroendocrine differentiation and FGFR1 amplification — requires precision tests that are not included in the protocol. Without these tests, Miriam receives the same treatment as a patient with a completely different tumor.
gofundme.transparency_text: Every expense is publicly documented. Quotes are requested from recognized centers (NMI-TT Germany, MD Anderson Madrid, VHIO Barcelona) and shared with the community.

contact.message: If you have relevant information about clinical trials, medical contacts, or want to collaborate in any way, don't hesitate to reach out.

footer.disclaimer: This site is an informational resource maintained by the patient's support team. It does not replace professional medical advice.
footer.made_with: Made with care, science, and a lot of AI.
